TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ricky_Berry, title = Ricky_Berry, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ricky_Berry} }

S.FORM: Ricky Berry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 10, Ricky Berry, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ricky Berry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 10, Ricky Berry, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1989) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: riʦ~ʨkj βerrj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, riʦ~ʨkj βerrj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
